action_set_definitions.name: query_system_logs
action_set_definitions.description: Search system logs for specific status identifiers or heading states.

action_set_definitions.name: query_maintenance_reports
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieve maintenance history and health status for equipment units.

equipment_type.description: The type of equipment to check (e.g., 'Tier 4 LHD').

action_set_definitions.name: get_equipment_specs
action_set_definitions.description: Get engineering specifications (like CFM requirements) for specific equipment models.

unit_id.description: The unique ID of the equipment unit.

action_set_definitions.name: get_ventilation_status
action_set_definitions.description: Get real-time sensor data for a specific heading, including airflow and fan metrics.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_ventilation_control
action_set_definitions.description: Modify fan frequency or air door positions to change airflow.

device_id.description: The ID of the fan or door to adjust.

control_type.description: The type of adjustment to make.

target_value.description: The new value (Hz for fans, percentage for doors).

state_description.fans: Status of all primary and local fans including frequency (Hz) and power consumption.
state_description.air_doors: The opening percentage (0-100) of ventilation doors in various sectors.
state_description.gas_levels: Concentrations of CH4 (%) and CO (ppm) across monitored locations.
state_description.airflow_data: Air velocity (m/s) and volume (m3/min) in different mine tunnels.
state_description.alerts: Current active safety alarms or equipment malfunctions.
